description.zh-cn: 人机验证：集成 Google reCAPTCHA v2 / Cloudflare Turnstile / hCaptcha，自动在前台注入验证脚本并提供服务端校验接口(/api 验证 token)，用于注册/登录/下单等场景防机器人与刷单。需在对应平台申请站点密钥。
description.en: Bot protection: integrates Google reCAPTCHA v2 / Cloudflare Turnstile / hCaptcha, auto-injects the widget script to the storefront and exposes a server-side token verify endpoint for register/login/checkout. Requires site keys from the provider.
